description: Verify SQL column names are converted to snake_case Rust field names

rust-sqlx.row_struct:
#[derive(Debug, sqlx::FromRow)]
pub struct GetUserFieldsRow {
    pub id: i32,
    pub user_id: i32,
    pub created_at: chrono::DateTime<chrono::Utc>,
    pub first_name: String,
}

name: snake_case_fields
schema_sql: CREATE TABLE users (id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, "userId" INTEGER NOT NULL, created_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW(), "firstName" TEXT NOT NULL);
